summary: Verified hero background video and modal video use object-fit: contain (no cropping) on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x667). Correct video source (demoreel_2026_ripple.mp4) confirmed. Modal opens via 'Watch Our Reel' and video element has controls. No video-related console errors.
passed: Background video src points to hx0nabz1_demoreel_2026_ripple.mp4
Video element attributes: autoplay=true, muted=true, playsInline present
'Watch Our Reel' button opens modal with video[controls]
Modal video computed objectFit === 'contain' on desktop and mobile
Modal video src points to demoreel_2026_ripple.mp4
Zero console errors (video/media/mp4) captured during full flow
notes: In headless Chromium the video readyState remained 0 (videoWidth=0) during the short test window - this is a headless codec/network artifact and NOT a code bug. The CSS contract that eliminates cropping (object-fit: contain, no transform scale) is verified in the live DOM. Screenshots captured at .screenshots/{desktop_hero,mobile_hero,modal_desktop,modal_mobile}.png.
